arts.sum: This week in Lazio history: 4-4 draw with Milan, Giordano’s double lob goal, the first Serie A game, and we remember the great Silvio Piola. Matches of the Week Date: Sunday, September 30, 1984 Venue: Stadio Olimpico, Rome Fixture: Lazio Inter 1-1 Juan Carlo Lorenzo returns and Lazio finally get their first point. arts.sum: Lazio will be gunning for their second Europa League victory in as many outings when they host Nice in Rome. The clash takes place at the Stadio Olimpico and kicks off on Thursday at 18:45 CET. arts.ttl: Europa League | Lazio v Nice: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: Lazio are set for their home debut in this season’s Europa League as they prepare to face Ligue 1 side Nice on Thursday afternoon. After an impressive 3-0 away victory against Dynamo Kyiv in Hamburg, the Biancocelesti aim to maintain their position atop the group standings while continuing their strong form from Serie A. Baroni is expected to make several changes to the lineup that defeated Torino in their recent Serie A match. In goal, Mandas is likely to start, although there’s still a possibility that Provedel could retain his place. The defense is set to feature Marusic and Pellegrini The post Europa League | Lazio v Nice: Probable starting lineups appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Juventus and Lazio Already Priced Out for Former Target
arts.sum: Mason Greenwood has thrived since transferring from Manchester United to Olympique Marseille, fueling the regrets of Juventus and Lazio, which had a chance to sign him last summer. He didn’t transfer for cheap, as the Ligue 1 side spent €26M. The post Juventus and Lazio Already Priced Out for Former Target appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.
